name: Raycast
philosophy: Raycast's marketing system reads like an extended product screenshot.
trademark_signals: Single dark surface mode with a 4-step surface ladder: (#07080a) → (#0d0d0d) → (#101111) → (#121212)
White CTA pill (#ffffff) is the universal primary action; everything else is monochrome dark
Inter typography with font-feature-settings: "calt", "kern", "liga", "ss03" enabled site-wide — the ss03 alternate g is part of the brand voice
Hairline 1px borders (#242728) carry every card edge; there are no drop shadows in the system
Multi-radius card vocabulary: (6px) for keycaps, (8px) for buttons and small cards, (10px) for feature cards, (16px) for hero command-palette mockup containers
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a light mode. The system is dark-only by design
Don't add drop shadows on cards. Elevation is built from the surface ladder, not from shadows
Don't replace (white) with a tinted accent for the primary CTA. Pure white is the brand action color
